name: Orange Tangerine Mimosa
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup chilled sparkling mineral water or seltzer water
recipeInstructions:
1. Juice the fruits using a hand or electric juicer.
2. Blend together the juice until smooth.
3. Divide the juice between 2 goblets.
4. Fill each goblet with the sparkling water.
Makes 2 servings.
Per serving: calories - 37, protein - 1 g, carbohydrate - 9 g, fat - trace, calories from fat - less than 1%, dietary fiber - trace, cholesterol - ~0 mg, sodium - 1 mg, potassium - 107 mg. Joslin Exchanges: 1/2 fruit.
